name: Jon Ossoff
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $5,280,917 for Jon Ossoff in U.S. Senate, GA. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $5,280,917.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
